description: Same agent across turns; the second user query swaps the ticker but is otherwise vague ('what about X?'). Tests that the classifier inherits agent context from history while still extracting the new entity.

turns.text: Microsoft (MSFT) is a US-listed large-cap technology company spanning cloud (Azure), productivity software, and AI infrastructure. Want to dig into a specific angle — fundamentals, recent earnings, or competitive position?
Apple (AAPL) is a US-listed large-cap consumer-tech company, dominated by iPhone revenue with growing services and wearables. Same options — fundamentals, recent earnings, or comp set?

assertions.notes: Vague follow-up — agent must come from history, ticker from current turn.
Even more elliptical ('and amazon'). Tests that brand-name → ticker still resolves under history-anchored context.
